data.title: AHF to show solidarity against hate at MLK Day events across the country.
data.description: In Los Angeles, an initiative by AHF will publicly oppose hate during Martin Luther King, Jr. Day events across the nation. The campaign aims to address discrimination and promote unity, with a focus on spreading awareness against bigotry.AHF plans to hold events on a national scale to commemorate the civil rights leader's legacy and emphasize the importance of acceptance and equality. By organizing various activities and initiatives, AHF intends to engage communities in meaningful discussions, reaching out to a wide audience. This effort signifies a significant step towards combating hate and intolerance, fostering a culture of respect and understanding. Let us join hands in this collective endeavor to honor the principles Martin Luther King, Jr. stood for.

data.title: 3M stock Q4 earnings expect $1.80/share, revenue $6.02B. Deutsche Bank downgraded to Hold, $178 target. Dividend yield 1.71%.
data.description: The 3M Company is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Jan. 20 before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of $1.80 per share, up from $1.68 per share last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be around $6.02 billion, higher than the $5.81 billion reported in the previous year. Recently, Deutsche Bank analyst Nicole Deblase downgraded 3M from Buy to Hold, with a revised price target of $178, down from $199. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 1.71%. Investors are keeping a close watch on potential gains from dividends as well. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ford is considering a partnership with BYD for hybrid vehicle batteries as it shifts focus from fully electric cars. Ford's hybrid sales increased by 18%.
data.description: Ford Motor Co. is currently discussing a potential partnership with China's BYD Co. Ltd. about supplying batteries for some of its hybrid vehicle models. This collaboration, if finalized, would mark a shift in Ford's powertrain strategy as they pivot away from a focus on fully electric vehicles. With the demand for full EVs slowing down, Ford and other car manufacturers are turning towards hybrids as a more promising avenue for growth. According to the Wall Street Journal, Ford experienced an 18% increase in hybrid sales recently. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Garrett Motion plans to report their Q4 2025 financial results with a conference call on Feb 19, 2026.
data.description: Garrett Motion has announced that they will be hosting a conference call to discuss their fourth quarter financial results of 2025 on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Shareholders and interested parties are invited to join the call to hear an update on the company's performance during that period. It is an opportunity to gain insight into Garrett Motion's financial standing and projections for the future. Make sure to mark your calendars for this important event.

data.title: Novee unveils $51.5M funding to combat AI cyberattacks with proprietary AI hacker, led by YL Ventures & Canaan Partners.
data.description: An AI offensive security company, Novee, has recently come out of stealth mode in Tel Aviv, Israel. The company's launch was backed by a significant $51.5 million in total funding, with leading investments from YL Ventures, Canaan Partners, and Oren Zeev (Zeev Ventures). Novee managed to secure its Series A funding within just four months of its inception, marking one of the quickest funding accomplishments in the offensive security field. This success was attributed to strong customer support, a skilled team with expertise in AI research and offensive cybersecurity, and continuous growth.

data.title: Trump files criminal charges against Fed chief, causing global concern. Many suspect it's to push for lower interest rates.
data.description: A move that is seen by many as politically motivated, US President Donald Trump has announced the filing of criminal charges against the leader of the Federal Reserve. This decision is speculated to stem from Trump's wish for decreased interest rates.

data.title: Steps to become a CEO - prove readiness to decision makers. Article from Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: To attain the position of CEO within your company, it is crucial to demonstrate your readiness to key stakeholders. By showcasing your capabilities and potential, you can position yourself as a strong candidate for the role. By following specific steps and effectively communicating your qualifications, you can increase your chances of becoming the Chief Executive Officer.

data.title: Senate committees postpone Clarity Act meetings as Coinbase raises concerns; Senate Dems to talk with crypto reps.
data.description: Meetings regarding the Clarity Act in the Senate committees have been postponed while Coinbase raises objections to certain aspects of the crypto market structure bill. Senate Democrats are planning to address these concerns with representatives from the crypto industry. The delay comes as the bill has generated significant interest, with discussions revolving around how to regulate the crypto market. It is anticipated that these consultations between senators and industry leaders will play a crucial role in shaping the final version of the legislation.

data.title: Trump announced that the individual who leaked information on Venezuela is now in custody, while some Polymarket accounts linked to early wagers on Maduro's removal have gone mute.
data.description: President Trump announced that the individual responsible for leaking information on Venezuela has been apprehended and is now imprisoned. This comes as several Polymarket accounts linked to early wagers on the overthrow of Maduro have ceased activity.

data.title: Greed & Fear strategist at Jefferies drops BTC to zero amid quantum risk, shifts 10% to gold.
data.description: Christopher Wood, the Greed & Fear strategist at Jefferies, has recently reduced his portfolio's Bitcoin allocation by 10% and shifted into gold. This decision was influenced by concerns about the substantial risk associated with Bitcoin.

data.title: Global report on Bismuth Methane Sulfonate (CAS 82617-81-0) forecasts market trends 2019-2024 and 2025-2029. Details on applications, manufacturing methods, patents, suppliers, prices, end-users.
data.description: A report on Bismuth Methane Sulfonate (CAS 82617-81-0) has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides detailed insights on the global and regional market trends spanning from 2019 to 2024, with forecasts up to 2029. It covers a wide range of information including general data, synonyms, chemical composition, safety measures, hazards, handling procedures, storage guidelines, as well as toxicological and ecological aspects related to Bismuth methane sulfonate. Additionally, the report offers transportation information. This comprehensive study provides valuable details for industry stakeholders.

data.title: Arch Biopartners appoints Dr. Patrick Vink as Chairman of the Board on Jan. 15, 2026. TSX Venture: ARCH, OTCQB: ACHFF.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Arch Biopartners Inc. revealed the selection of Dr. Patrick Vink as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors. The Company, known as Arch, operates under the tickers TSX Venture: ARCH and OTCQB: ACHFF. Dr. Vink officially assumed the role on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Meisha Lutsey appointed to INSA's Board of Directors by CACI International Inc, representing intelligence and national security.
data.description: CACI International Inc revealed today that Meisha Lutsey, the executive vice president of mission and engineering support at CACI, has been appointed to the Board of Directors of the Intelligence and National Security Alliance (INSA). INSA, representing the needs of the industrial base with the intelligence and national security communities, appointed Lutsey to the Board. Lutsey expressed her honor at being chosen for the role, highlighting the importance of INSA's work in aligning the industrial base's objectives. This development comes following the announcement made by CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI).

data.title: Kennedy Funding provides $2.1 million loan for synagogue in Ferndale, NY. Leading in nontraditional property funding.
data.description: A leading lender in New Jersey, Kennedy Funding, remains at the forefront of financing nontraditional properties. On January 16, 2026, the company sealed a deal for a $2.1 million working capital loan to NSB Estate, LLC. The loan was specifically aimed at supporting a recently built religious facility in Ferndale, showcasing Kennedy Funding's dedication to funding unique and diverse real estate projects.

data.title: AllyGPO and BioCareSD partner to serve Retina Associates of Cleveland, meeting market need for advanced options.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 16, 2026, AllyGPO® and BioCareSD® revealed a new strategic partnership designed to cater to community-based specialty practices. As part of this collaboration, Retina Associates of Cleveland, Inc (RACI) has opted for BioCareSD's specialty distribution services. This agreement signifies a significant move within the industry, underscoring the importance of effective partnerships to serve specialized medical facilities. This partnership aims to enhance services for community-based specialty practices, with RACI serving as a key player in this alliance.

data.title: Wabtec to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 11, 2026; conference call at 8:30am ET. Visit www.WabtecCorp.com for webcast.
data.description: Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) disclosed plans to release its Q4 2025 financial results on February 11, 2026, before U.S. markets open. Following this, the company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day for analysts and investors. To participate in the webcast, individuals can access the call on Wabtec’s website at www.WabtecCorp.com under the “Investor Relations” section. Those unable to join live can access an audio replay afterwards.
